introSection: Phoenix is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Deno's Wonder Wheel Amusement Park in Brooklyn, New York, USA. It opened in July 2021.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Phoenix was announced in December 2020.

The first test runs took place in June 2021. Phoenix opened on July 2, 2021.

fullText:
Phoenix is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Deno's Wonder Wheel Amusement Park in Brooklyn, New York, USA. It opened in July 2021.

The addition of Phoenix was announced in December 2020.

The first test runs took place in June 2021. Phoenix opened on July 2, 2021.
